title: Edible Magic
description: Several new types of food to the game, which have unique effects
body:
**The mod adds several new types of food to the game, which have unique effects. The effects are often useful or funny, diversifying the gameplay.**

## List of food
- Hot Chocolate: gives temporary resistance to fire for 2 minutes.
  
- Cotton Candy: Increases movement speed for 30 seconds.
  
- Honeyed Golden Apple: restores 5 health and grants short-term regeneration.
  
- Ice-cold Lemonade: slows the player down, but gives him short-term damage resistance.
  
- Fortune Cookie: when eaten, the player receives a random positive effect that can last from 1 to 5 minutes.
  
- Spicy Chicken: when eaten, set the player on fire, but increases his strength.
  
- Moon Pie: makes the player fly into the air
  
- Tropical Smoothie: gives the player regeneration 9 level,dolphin grace 2 level and speed 2 level
  
- Energy Bar: significantly increases the player's speed
  
- Pear: gives the player juiciness 1 level and saturation 1 level
  
- Fruit Set: gives the player juiciness 3 level and health boost 2 level
